scope: source-lock command queue -> movement dispatch -> blocked/success side effects

citations.claim: command queue storage, first/last indexes, lock, and pending-click fields
secondary mouse movement rows map visible arrows/viewport to C001..C006/C080/C083
mouse click path stores pending clicks when locked and enqueues resolved commands otherwise
pending click replay occurs after the queue is unlocked
F0380 locks the queue, leaves gated movement queued, dequeues commands, replays pending clicks, then dispatches turns/moves
turn dispatch changes direction and processes stairs/current-square sensor boundary
movement dispatch maps command to relative delta, blocks before F0267, discards input on block, and applies timing only after success
successful move records destination result and party movement timing/scent state
successful party move processes source leave then destination enter sensors
sensor walker traverses square thing-list and triggers matching sensor effects in source order
relative movement math updates map coordinates and square lookup returns current map data
champion load/wound/boots movement tick calculation feeds post-success disabled movement ticks

orderChecks.claim: blocked path returns before successful F0267/timing path
successful move result/timing before leave/enter sensor side effects

firestaffEvidence.claim: compat queue models lock, pending replay, movement-disabled gate, and dispatch fields
compat command core owns F0380->F0365/F0366 parity boundaries: turns bypass movement gates, blocked steps discard input before side effects, accepted steps process leave/enter and timing
integration probe covers successful movement side effects, blocked movement side-effect absence, command gating, and command-core turn/step/collision/redraw seams
focused command-core probe proves PC34 keyboard movement rows survive dequeue into turn, successful movement, cooldown clearing, and blocked-movement queue discard
broader source-lock gate already ties command queue, movement legality, sensor order, and timing to Firestaff files
